history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with black, styled hair is sitting down, looking at his phone. He is wearing a dark blue Adidas track jacket with white stripes on the sleeves, and white pants that appear slightly distressed or ripped at the knee. He is holding a silver smartphone in his left hand and his right hand is near his face, holding the collar of his jacket.

The background suggests an indoor retail or lounge space. Behind him, there's a shelf unit with wooden paneling. On the top shelf, there are neatly folded clothing items in dark colors like burgundy, brown, and black. Below that, on a lower shelf, several pairs of women's high heels are displayed. To the right of the clothing shelves, there's a wooden counter or table with a stack of books or magazines, one of which has a metallic sculpture or pen holder on top.

The flooring appears to be large, light-colored tiles. In the foreground, to the left, a small silver stand and a white napkin or piece of paper are visible on the floor. A large, woven, light brown pillow is resting next to the man on his right.

The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a calm and casual atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by cool blues and grays from the man's attire and the flooring, contrasted with the warm wood tones of the background and the brown pillow. The overall mood is relaxed and contemporary, with a focus on the man's interaction with his phone. The style is modern and minimalist, with a hint of fashion or retail aesthetic due to the displayed items in the background.
